_perfGateNote: Recalibrated in the Task 6 perf pass (see task-6-report.md, 'Perf pass — map optimization + gate recalibration'). Post-optimization (positron basemap, idle-deferred + dynamic-import()'d MapLibre boot, preconnect) local median-of-5 was 0.52, with 15 total local runs across 3 batches ranging 0.50-0.55 — a floor of 0.50, notably tighter than the pre-optimization spread (0.31/0.49/0.49). minScore is set to 0.45: comfortably below the observed floor to absorb CI-vs-local environment noise while still requiring the genuine TBT/LCP improvement this pass delivered (TBT: 4840ms -> ~1700-2000ms). Do not raise this without re-measuring 5+ runs first.
